Off Calendar Sep-26-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on regular calendar for settlement conference. Siu Ma, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff and John Hourihan, Esq. appeared for defendant. Court and counsel meet and confer in chambers, which proceedings are not reported. The cause failed to settle. Trial date is confirmed.
